parameters.responseData: {"received":true,"message":"Aprobacion recibida. Se notificaran las asignaciones ya generadas por el backend."}

parameters.subject: =Ticket asignado: {{ $json.ticket_title }}
parameters.message:
=

Ticket asignado: {{ $json.ticket_title }}

Hola {{ $json.assignee_name }}, el Assignment Agent del backend te asigno este ticket despues de revisar skills y carga del equipo.

Proyecto{{ $json.project_name }}
Prioridad{{ $json.priority }}
Skill requerido{{ $json.required_skill }}
Horas estimadas{{ $json.estimate_hours }}h
Deadline{{ $json.deadline || 'Por definir' }}
Riesgo{{ $json.risk_pct }}%

Razonamiento del agente:
{{ $json.assignment_reasoning }}

Meeting to Tickets PM

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ approval_id: $json.approval_id, ticket_id: $json.ticket_id, member_id: $json.assignee_id, channel: 'email', template: 'ticket_assigned_after_backend_agent', status: 'sent', sent_at: $now.toISO(), metadata: { to: $json.assignee_email, project_name: $json.project_name, risk_pct: $json.risk_pct, source: 'backend_assignment_agent' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ approval_id: $json.approval_id, member_id: $json.manager_id, channel: 'email', template: 'manager_assignment_summary_after_backend_agent', status: 'sent', sent_at: $now.toISO(), metadata: { to: $json.manager_email, requirement_id: $json.requirement_id, total_assignments: $json.total_assignments, source: 'backend_assignment_agent' } }) }}
